title: Fork Packet Manifest Schema v0.1.1
description: Schema for the Fork packet manifest. The manifest declares all members with their SHA-256 digests, provides a canonical manifest digest, and is the input to the HMAC seal binding.

packet_id.description: Unique identifier for the packet this manifest describes.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the member artifact bytes.

membership_count_declared.description: Declared count of members. Verifier should confirm this matches the length of declared_members.

manifest_digest_method.description: Plain-language description of how the manifest digest is computed. Must be precise enough for independent recomputation.

manifest_digest_canonical_fields.description: The fields included in the canonical JSON representation used to compute the manifest digest.

manifest_digest.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the canonical manifest representation.

_schema_note: This schema closes the manifest object and member entries. Equality between membership_count_declared and array length, unique member_id/filename constraints, eligible-member enumeration, and canonical digest recomputation are mechanically enforced by verify_public_disclosure.py.
